statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); branch=$(git -C "$cwd" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo ""); dir=$(basename "$cwd"); ctx=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); rl5=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage // empty'); agent=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.agent.name // empty'); printf "\033[34m${dir}\033[0m"; [ -n "$branch" ] && printf "\033[33m (${branch})\033[0m"; [ -n "$ctx" ] && printf " \033[36m[ctx:${ctx}%%]\033[0m"; [ -n "$rl5" ] && printf " \033[35m[5h:${rl5}%%]\033[0m"; [ -n "$agent" ] && printf " \033[33m[agent:${agent}]\033[0m"; true
